commit.subject: LU-19492 kernel: update RHEL 9.6 [5.14.0-570.62.1.el9_6]
commit.message:
LU-19492 kernel: update RHEL 9.6 [5.14.0-570.62.1.el9_6]

Update RHEL 9.6 kernel to 5.14.0-570.62.1.el9_6.

Test-Parameters: trivial fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=zfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: optional fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testgroup=full-dne-part-1

  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testgroup=full-dne-part-2

  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testgroup=full-dne-part-3

  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testgroup=full-dne-zfs-part-3
